title: HorrorPlace VM Constellation Spine Index
description: Consolidated, machine-readable index formalizing the (objectKind, tier, repo) routing triple, invariant/metric bands, and schema bindings for contract families across the HorrorPlace VM-constellation.

version.description: Semantic version of this spine index instance format (not individual contract families).

generatedAt.description: Timestamp at which this spine index was generated.

notes.description: Optional human-readable note about this spine index snapshot.

spineEntries.description: Registered contract families and their routing, invariant, metric, and schema bindings.

Tier.description: Governance tier for the contract family.

RepoName.description: Canonical repository name within the HorrorPlace constellation.

BandKind.description: Strength of the invariant/metric band binding.

min.description: Inclusive lower bound for the scalar band.

max.description: Inclusive upper bound for the scalar band.

scalarBand.description: Optional numeric band associated with this invariant for this contract family.
Numeric band representing expected metric values for this contract family.

schemaRef.description: Canonical URI of the JSON Schema contract for artifacts of this family.

version.description: Semantic version of the schema contract for this family.

deprecated.description: If true, this schema version is still accepted but should not be used for new artifacts.

moduleName.description: Name of the runtime module responsible for enforcement (Lua, Rust, engine integration).

entrypoints.description: Named entrypoints (functions, RPCs) relevant for this contract family.

deadLedgerProfile.description: Optional profile name in HorrorPlace-Dead-Ledger-Network used for this contract family.

objectKind.description: Canonical contract family identifier, e.g. moodContract, seedContractCard, bci-geometry-tileset.

tiers.description: Allowed tiers for this contract family.

SpineEntry.title: Spine Entry
SpineEntry.description: Formal registration of a contract family in the constellation.

id.description: Opaque identifier for this spine entry (stable across versions of the same family).

schemas.description: Schema versions that define the structure of this contract family.

invariants.description: Invariants that must be respected by this contract family.

metrics.description: Entertainment metrics and their expected bands for this contract family.

runtime.description: Runtime modules that enforce or consume this contract family.

mathematicalConstraints.description: Optional versioned mathematical constraint definitions for this contract family.

version.description: Semantic version of this particular constraint expression.

expression.description: Human-readable representation of the mathematical constraint (LaTeX or DSL).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle stage of this contract family.

introducedIn.description: Semantic version of the spine index where this family first appeared.

replaces.description: Optional identifier of a previous spine entry superseded by this one.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of this contract family.

examples.description: Optional human-readable examples of valid artifacts of this family.
